economic_notes: BBH Limited Partnership (49.5% interest) provides personnel and equipment rentals to economic projects. Musselwhite Mine revenue included. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership gaming revenue. Portfolio investments in multiple Ontario businesses including Landmark Inn LP, Myguard Security Group LP, Thawikayhigan LP. Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc. operates community diesel generator and fuel hauling. Wunnumin Lake Community Telecommunications Corporation operates internet, cable TV and mobility. Community Development Fund operates community store.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Five consolidated subsidiaries: CMHC Housing Project, Mishamikiwiish Akiw Otabitamaageg, Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc., Wunnumin Lake Community Telecommunications Corporation, Wunnumin Lake Small Business Centre. One GBE: BBH Limited Partnership (49.5%) accounted for using modified equity method. Large deferred revenue balance of $29.85M primarily ISC funding. First Nation not in compliance with CMHC replacement reserve requirements. Tangible capital assets net book value not determinable from provided text. Long-term debt total estimated from partial note. Annual debt service includes repayment of long-term debt $1,538,825 and capital lease repayments $101,559. Total government transfers includes ISC $31,611,740 plus CMHC $140,414 plus Ontario Ministry of Community and Social Services $1,368,250. The statement of change in net debt shows net debt of $6,344,572 at year end.
